data.title: AAEM launches one-day simulation course to prepare physicians for 2026 ABEM Certifying Exam format.
data.description: A course designed to prepare physicians for the 2026 ABEM Certifying Exam has been introduced by the American Academy of Emergency Medicine (AAEM). The Certifying Exam Review Course, conducted in person over one day, offers simulation-based training to assist emergency medical professionals. The course aims to enhance their readiness for the upcoming exam. This initiative was announced in Milwaukee on December 11, 2025. The simulation experience provided during the course will aid physicians in familiarizing themselves with the exam format and content, ultimately improving their performance.

data.title: Azio AI assists Philippines with national investment fund modernization for long-term growth. Los Angeles, Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Azio AI, the AI compute and GPU infrastructure subsidiary of Azio, revealed its involvement in early-stage technical and infrastructure talks to aid in modernizing the Philippines. This initiative aims to enhance the country's technological capabilities and enhance its overall infrastructure. The company's contribution is part of a larger effort to support the national initiative and ensure its success.

data.title: Do Kwon gets 15-year jail term for $40B Terra crypto crash, involving UST and Luna collapse in May 2022.
data.description: Following the May 2022 collapse of UST and Luna, Terraform Labs founder Do Kwon has been sentenced to a 15-year prison term. The collapse resulted in a loss of $40 billion.

data.title: Twelve Seas Investment Company III priced $150M IPO with 15M units at $10 each, trading on Nasdaq from Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, the Twelve Seas Investment Company III (NASDAQ: TWLVU) revealed the pricing of its initial public offering, consisting of 15,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. These units will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “TWLVU” starting December 12, 2025. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share of the Company and one right for a fraction (1/10) of a Class A ordinary share post the Company’s initial business combination. Post separation of the securities, the Class A ordinary shares and rights are expected to be listed on NASDAQ as “TWLV” and “TWLVR”, respectively. The offering is expected to close around December 15, 2025, pending customary closing conditions.

data.title: Terraform co-founder gets 15-year prison term after plea; Judge listens to victims before sentencing.
data.description: A federal judge listened to testimony from numerous victims of Terraform Labs and Do Kwon for several hours before reaching a sentencing decision for the co-founder.

data.title: TTEC named Major Contender in Everest Group's 2025 Sales Services PEAK Matrix Assessment for B2B & B2C.
data.description: TTEC has earned the title of Major Contender in the 2025 Everest Group Sales Services (B2B & B2C) PEAK Matrix® Assessment, cementing its position in the competitive landscape. This recognition underscores TTEC's prominence in the industry and highlights its exceptional performance and capabilities.

data.title: DIRTT secures C$15.0 million loan from BDC for refinancing, strengthening financial position.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on December 11, 2025, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. shared that they signed a letter agreement with the Business Development Bank of Canada. Under the agreement, BDC agreed to provide a loan of up to C$15.0 million to DIRTT. This financial assistance is subject to specific conditions that need to be met by the Company.

data.title: Alpine Banks of Colorado to repurchase up to $5 million of its Class B voting common stock.
data.description: The holding company for Alpine Bank, Alpine Banks of Colorado, headquartered in Glenwood Springs, Colorado, disclosed on December 11, 2025, that its board of directors has sanctioned a stock repurchase initiative. Under this program, Alpine is authorized to buy back a maximum of $5 million worth of its Class B voting common stock that is currently in circulation.

data.title: Voltagrid and Halliburton commit 400 MW to power data centers, aiming for sustainable energy solutions in the Eastern Hemisphere.
data.description: In Houston, Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) and VoltaGrid have achieved a major milestone in their partnership with the confirmation of manufacturing orders for 400 megawatts (MW) of modular natural gas power systems. These systems are scheduled for delivery in 2028 and will be utilized to aid in the establishment of data centers in various locations across the Eastern Hemisphere. This joint commitment signifies a dedication to providing cutting-edge and environmentally friendly energy solutions to address the changing needs of global infrastructure.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: VNDA) to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15, 2026 in San Francisco.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. revealed its participation in the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2026, in San Francisco, California. The company, listed as VNDA on the Nasdaq, will conduct a corporate presentation at 9:00.
